scripts.coverage: npm run prisma:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.coverage.json && c8 --all --src src --report-dir coverage/full --temp-directory .nyc_output/full --reporter text-summary --reporter json-summary --reporter lcov node scripts/run-tests.js
scripts.coverage:auth: npm run prisma:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.coverage.json && c8 --all --src src --report-dir coverage/auth --temp-directory .nyc_output/auth --reporter text-summary --reporter json-summary --reporter lcov node scripts/run-tests.js test/authGatewayRoutes.test.js test/localLoginRoutes.test.js test/authAdminBffRoutes.test.js test/userIdentityRoutes.test.js test/localCredentialRoutes.test.js test/localIdentityUseCases.test.js test/localIdentityHttp.test.js test/authContext.test.js test/envValidation.test.js
scripts.coverage:auth:check: npm run coverage:auth && node scripts/check-coverage-thresholds.mjs --scope auth
